Como usar: cadastre imóveis e registre v: How to use: register properties and record visits per your local workflow. Specialized capability: when enabled, health-surveillance routines apply—including entomological visits, LIRAa, and PNCD—aligned with Law 11.350/2006 and Ministry of Health guidance. Legislação e finalidade deste painel: Legislation and purpose of this dashboard
Lei nº 8.080/1990 (SUS): atividades de v: Law 8.080/1990 (SUS): health surveillance activities and information for management.
Lei nº 11.350/2006. Atua na atenção bási: Law No. 11.350/2006. Works in primary care and the Family Health Strategy; may take part in integrated territorial actions, including LIRAa (National Directive for Integrated ACE and ACS Action).
Lei nº 11.350/2006. Profissional do SUS: Law No. 11.350/2006. SUS professional with duties in disease surveillance, prevention and control, and health promotion (epidemiological and environmental surveillance).
Lei nº 11.350/2006: ACS e ACE; registro: Law 11.350/2006: community health and endemic control agents; field action records aligned with municipal organization.
Lei nº 12.527/2011 (LAI): classificação: Law 12.527/2011 (transparency): classification and internal use of aggregated statistical information, where applicable.
Lei nº 13.709/2018 (LGPD): bases legais: Law 13.709/2018 (LGPD): legal bases for processing in public health and Article 6 safeguards (necessity, adequacy, security).
Lei nº :lei: Agentes Comunitários de Saú: Law No. :lei: Community Health and Endemic Disease Control Agents (ACS and ACE).
Lei nº :lei: diretrizes do SUS e vigilân: Law No. :lei: SUS guidelines and health surveillance.
Lei nº :lei: proteção de dados pessoais: Law No. :lei: personal data protection (LGPD), including grounds for public health processing.
LGPD: observações sobre ocupantes nesta: LGPD: notes about residents on this visit (view full text)
LGPD e tratamento dos dados neste painel: LGPD and data processing in this dashboard
Limites desta consulta e onde buscar aju: What this lookup shows and where to get help (expand)
Links levam ao texto legal consolidado n: Links point to consolidated statutes; for up-to-date technical guidance, use the Ministry of Health’s official channels.
Lista de doenças indisponível agora; use: Disease list unavailable right now; use the form above to look up visits.

The CPF or email field is required.
O CEP informado não pertence ao municípi: The ZIP code must belong to the same municipality as the primary location (:city/:state).

Offline: opening a visit requires internet.
O gestor acompanha no sistema totais de: Managers track totals, open follow-ups, distribution by neighborhood, PDF reports, and occupant profile panels in the system: a basis for planning and internal transparency.
O local <strong>primário</strong> é o en: The primary location is the municipality’s reference address in the system. It was configured in advance by the manager and cannot be edited or deleted from the interface. Other locations are properties visited by field staff (ACE/ACS).
O local primário (primeiro cadastrado) n: The primary location (first registered) cannot be edited in the interface. For changes, contact technical support.
The primary location (first registered) cannot be deleted in the interface. For removal or changes, contact technical support.
O local primário não pode ser editado pe: The primary location cannot be edited in the interface. For changes, contact technical support.
Olá, :nome. Central LIRAa: visitas de le: Hello, :nome. LIRAa hub: survey visits and property registration.
Olá, :nome. Registre visitas e mantenha: Hello, :nome. Register visits and keep locations up to date in the field.
Olá, :nome. Visão geral do município e a: Hello, :nome. Municipality overview and shortcuts for daily work.
O perfil ACS permite registrar a ativida: The ACS profile can record LIRAa activity per the National Guideline for Integrated ACE and ACS Action (MoH).
O que oferece: leituras por período, ter: What you get: views by period, territory, visits, properties, and role-allowed aggregates, with reports and exports. Goal: support decisions, planning, and accountability. Indicator scope is broad and not limited to a single visit type.
Ordenado da visita mais recente para a m: Sorted from newest visit to oldest.
Orientação de uso e confidencialidade de: Usage guidance and confidentiality for this panel
Os dados abaixo são apenas informativos:: The information below is for reference only: registered location, visit dates, type of field activity, and whether there was a pending item at the time, in the same summary style as internal management, without naming staff.
The data below is informational only: registered location, visit dates, and whether follow-up was pending at the time. It does not replace contact with the municipal health department.
Os indicadores reúnem apenas dados cadas: Indicators only include data entered in Visita Aí, with municipality-configured aggregation and suppression to reduce re-identification risk, consistent with Brazil’s LGPD and access-to-information law.
O sistema detecta se você está com inter: The system detects if you are online. When you tap the button, the visit will be :fragment or saved on the device to send later.
O sistema sugere doenças com base no his: The system suggests diseases based on the property history, municipal visits, and words you wrote in the notes.
Os locais aparecerão aqui quando os prof: Locations will appear here once professionals (ACE/ACS) register them.
O Visita Aí organiza a gestão municipal: Visita Aí organizes municipal management around broad-scope dashboards and indicators. Property records, field visits, and optional complementary data feed those metrics. Entomological surveillance visits, LIRAa, and PNCD workflows are specialized health operations when a municipality adopts them—they do not define the whole product. Public lookup by code reinforces transparency without showing clinical data.
O Visita Aí apoia o trabalho de vigilânc: Visita Aí supports health surveillance and vector control under federal law and Ministry of Health guidance; public lookup is limited to non-sensitive property-related data.
O Visita Aí segue a Lei nº 11.350/2006 (: Visita Aí follows Law No. 11.350/2006 (ACE and ACS), the integrated guidance for these roles, national urban arbovirus guidelines, and the National Dengue Control Program (PNCD), as reference for field work and public transparency.
Painel agregado de ocupantes no Visita A: Aggregated occupant panel in Visita Aí: property neighborhood, age bands, education, income, race/color, and work status, with privacy safeguards and institutional use.
Painel do :perfil. Registre visitas, ger: :perfil dashboard. Register visits, manage locations, and consult monitored diseases. Under Law 11.350/2006 and Ministry of Health guidance.
Painel do :perfil. Registre visitas LIRA: :perfil dashboard. Register LIRAa visits and consult monitored diseases. Under Law 11.350/2006 and Ministry of Health guidance.
Painel do gestor municipal. Acompanhe es: Municipal manager dashboard. Follow statistics and manage diseases, locations, visits, users, and reports.
Para guardar visitas sem internet, use «: To save visits offline, use the :btn button on the visit form; they will appear in this list for upload.
Para o filtro funcionar, todos os campos: For filters to work, all fields marked with * must be filled or selected.
Para orientação sanitária, segunda via d: For health guidance, document copies, or complaints, contact your municipal health department.
Para um tratamento ser considerado válid: For a treatment to be valid and saved, all related fields must be filled in.
PDF legenda a1e texto: Breeding sites inspected by type (LIRAa classification | MoH).
PDF legenda nr texto: N: routine, R: recovery (per MS guideline).
PDF legenda tipo imóvel texto: R: residential, C: commercial, T: vacant lot (PE = activity 8, not property type).
Vigilância entomológica municipal: consu: Municipal entomological surveillance: public lookup for residents and support for ACE and ACS teams within Brazil’s Unified Health System (SUS).
Plataforma municipal: indicadores e pain: Municipal platform: broad-scope indicators and dashboards fed by property records and field visits. Entomological surveillance, LIRAa, and PNCD are specialized capabilities when the municipality adopts them. Public lookup by code, no clinical data.
Plataforma municipal para registrar e ac: Municipal platform to register and track field visits against dengue, chikungunya, Zika, and other arboviruses. Managers and agents work in the system; as a resident, you can check when your address was visited, using the code the ACE or ACS provided.
Por favor, aguarde um momento antes de s: Please wait a moment before requesting another link.

Responsável pela coordenação/supervisão: Responsible for coordinating and supervising surveillance actions at the municipal level (MS Directive, Health Surveillance management).
Public lookup by property code. Transparency on field visits; complementary household data is not on this public page.

Terminologia e atividades conforme Diret: Terminology and activities per National Guidelines for Prevention and Control of Urban Arboviruses (entomological surveillance and vector control) | Ministry of Health.
Terminologia e tipos de visita alinhados: Visit types and terminology aligned with Ministry of Health recommendations (entomological surveillance and vector control). References: Law 11,350/2006; National Guidelines for Prevention and Control of Urban Arboviruses.

Transparência para o cidadão e apoio à v: Transparency for residents and support for municipal surveillance: visit lookup, management, and field records for ACE and ACS, aligned with Brazil’s Unified Health System (SUS).
Transparência para quem mora no imóvel,: Transparency for residents, indicators for municipal managers, and digital support for ACE and ACS. In one place, focused on dengue and other arboviruses.

Use the «:btn» button at the end of the form. The visit is saved only on your device. When online, open «:menu» and tap «:action» to send them all at once.

Utilizamos cookies para melhorar sua exp: We use cookies to improve your experience, remember your preferences (such as light/dark theme), and keep the site working. By continuing, you agree to essential cookies.
Utilize este campo para registrar observ: Use this field for additional visit notes such as conditions found, difficulties, or recommendations.
Veja as datas das visitas de vigilância: See vector-control visit dates for your property using only the code the ACE or ACS left at the address. Fast, free, and without exposing clinical data online.
Veja as visitas que você registrou, busq: See visits you registered, search, edit, or add new ones. In the field without internet, save on the device and send later via sync.
Grátis e sem cadastro: informe o código: Free, no account: enter the voucher code or the one the ACE or ACS gave you during the visit.
Ver sugestões de doenças para este imóve: View disease suggestions for this property
Visita Aí apoia a vigilância entomológic: Visita Aí supports entomological surveillance and municipal vector control, aligned with Ministry of Health guidelines. Professionals register visits; residents check property history with the unique code.
Visita Aí reúne consulta pública pelo có: Visita Aí brings public lookup by property code, dashboards with municipal indicators for management, and field registration by ACE/ACS, aligned with Ministry of Health guidance.
Visita cadastrada no dispositivo com suc: Visit saved on the device successfully. It will sync when the connection is available.
Visitas de levantamento e cadastro de im: Survey visits and property registration. When offline, save on the device and sync later.
Visitas de vigilância entomológica e con: Registered entomological surveillance and vector control visits. View, search, edit, or remove your visits.
Registered entomological surveillance and vector control visits. View and search visits completed by staff (ACE/ACS).
Visualize, edite ou exclua doenças cadas: View, edit, or delete diseases registered for municipal surveillance. Add new ones to guide field work.
Visualize e aprove cadastros que aguarda: Review and approve registrations waiting for access.
Visualize e busque visitas registradas p: View and search visits registered by field professionals (ACE and ACS).
Visão geral do município, indicadores e: Municipal overview, indicators, and shortcuts for daily work.

Bairros com visita registrada: Neighborhoods with at least one registered visit
Indicadores em tela são totais operacion: Figures shown are aggregated operational totals. Occupant panels, per-neighborhood detail, and exports are available in the restricted municipal manager area.
O Visita Aí apoia vigilância em saúde e: Visita Aí supports health surveillance and vector control. Foundations: Law 11.350/2006 (community health and endemic control agents), Law 8.080/1990 (SUS), and Law 13.709/2018 (LGPD). Ministry of Health rules and technical notes (arboviruses, PNCD) guide operations.
Para reduzir risco de reidentificação, o: To reduce re-identification risk, aggregated territory figures appear only once there is a minimum volume of visits.
Referência nacional em saúde pública e d: National reference for public health and data protection
Textos legais consolidados no Planalto;: Consolidated statutes on Planalto; up-to-date health guidance on the Ministry of Health website.
Transparência · Gestão municipal · Campo: Transparency · Municipal management · Field teams connected
Public lookup with the property code. Digital records for field agents. Indicators for planning.
Os totais do painel público estão desati: Public dashboard totals are turned off in settings. Property code lookup and system sign-in remain available.
ACE e ACS registram visitas em campo, al: Field staff record visits in line with Law 11.350/2006 and national Ministry of Health guidance.
Consulta pelo código do imóvel, gestão m: Property code lookup, municipal management, and field records for health agents, aligned with Ministry of Health guidance.
Code-based lookup, integrated municipal management, and field records aligned with the Brazilian Unified Health System (SUS).
Fundamentos federais: Leis 11.350/2006 (: Federal basis: Laws 11.350/2006 (field agents), 8.080/1990 (SUS), and 13.709/2018 (LGPD). Technical guidance: Ministry of Health, PNCD, and arboviruses.
Gestor centraliza visitas, imóveis, rela: Managers centralize visits, properties, reports, and internal indicators, with role-based access control.
Morador consulta o histórico de visitas: Residents check visit history with the property code, with no sign-up and no clinical data exposed online.
Textos no Planalto; orientações sanitári: Statutes on Planalto; current health guidance on the Ministry of Health portal. Where the municipality runs health surveillance, guidance for ACE, ACS, and entomological surveillance also applies.
Ative a 2FA com aplicativo autenticador: Turn on 2FA with an authenticator app to protect your account.
Escaneie o QR code ou use a chave manual: Scan the QR code or use the manual key, then confirm with the 6-digit code from your app.
ACE e ACS registram visitas em campo qua: ACE and ACS record field visits when the municipality uses this workflow, under Law 11.350/2006 and Ministry of Health and PNCD guidance. Property and household data can support other municipal needs, with or without vector-control visits.
Imóveis, visitas de campo e cadastro com: Property records, field visits, and complementary household data, with support for entomological surveillance and PNCD and Ministry of Health vector control, as configured by the municipality.
O módulo de visitas pode seguir as diret: The visits module can follow Ministry of Health guidance: health surveillance, arboviruses, and PNCD. Property data and complementary occupancy and socioeconomic information are autonomous: they support municipal management and policy, with or without vector-control visits.
Painel do :perfil. Visitas de campo, PNC: :perfil dashboard. Field visits, PNCD per municipal enablement, properties, and complementary household data. Use what your municipality has defined. Law 11.350/2006 and Ministry of Health guidance.
Registre visitas, mantenha locais e comp: Record visits, keep properties up to date, and complete complementary household data when it is part of your local workflow; use shortcuts for the most common tasks.
Painel do gestor municipal: visitas, imó: Municipal manager dashboard: visits, registered properties, occupants, indicators, and reports; modules that integrate according to local needs.
Relatórios de visitas de campo, indicado: Field visit reports, period indicators, and a summary of complementary property data (occupants and socioeconomic profile). Generate PDFs using the filters.
Imóveis vinculados às visitas do período: Properties linked to visits in the filtered period.
Resumo por imóvel: quantidade de ocupant: Per property: occupant count and whether the socioeconomic form is filled. The PDF includes the same table.
:n ocupante(s) no cadastro do imóvel: :n occupant(s) on file for this property
PDF seção cadastro complementar nota: Optional municipal data: registered occupants and property socioeconomic profile (Visita Aí complementary module, independent of surveillance visit records).
Na consulta pública aparecem apenas ende: The public page only shows the address linked to the code, dates and status of field visits, and municipality-published disease information. It does not show clinical data, occupants’ names, or the property’s socioeconomic record.
Menu lateral: imóveis legenda: Addresses, occupants, and complementary household data.
Menu lateral: vigilância legenda: Field visits (epidemiology/entomology), referenced diseases, and PDF reports.
Menu lateral ACS: liraa legenda: Activities per Ministry of Health guidance / LIRAa.
